sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table AS SELECT * FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/aapl_stock.csv', NOSIGN, 'CSVWithNames') LIMIT 0;
INSERT INTO test_table SELECT * FROM s3('https://datasets-documentation.s3.eu-west-3.amazonaws.com/aapl_stock.csv', NOSIGN, 'CSVWithNames') LIMIT 5;
UPDATE test_table SET column_name = 'new_value' WHERE column_name = 'old_value';
